stem: A vendor sells two types of fruit: apples and pears. The total cost to buy a apples and p pears is given by a linear equation. If buying 20 apples (and no pears) costs $25.00, what is the price, in dollars, of one apple?
rationale: If 20 apples cost $25.00, then one apple costs 25.00 / 20 = $1.25.
